scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.serve: npm run build -w client && npm run dev -w server
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w client && npm run lint -w server
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w client && npm run typecheck -w server
scripts.test: npm run test -w client && npm run test -w server
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules client/node_modules server/node_modules client/dist server/dist *.db
